title: Super Mario Bros. Severe Corruption
description: Okay.. this is got to be the most violent corruption of all of my SMB corruption videos! I've added and enabled some game genie codes, including the famous IKAAAE code, which would mess up the whole entire game. I obviously had to reset the game at some point when the game itself comes to an unexpected game freeze. The graphics, sprites, music, sound, and background is all messed up.. but most certainly.. the game is severely f*cked up is all I can say!
